issues.title: Typo in 'Default System Text with parameters' Example - Spring AI Documentation

comments.body:
@AshwinKrishnaK I don't think this is wrong, because if you look at the code, it follows the `Map.of` format.
According to `Map.of("key", "value")` method, key is "completion", value is `chatClient.prompt().system(sp -> sp.param("voice", voice)).user(message).call().content()`.

If you look at the `chatclient.adoc file`, you will see a compilation exception if you follow your code :)

![스크린샷 2024-06-28 오후 10 38 17](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/assets/90085154/430715fa-ab99-48ce-a493-59393a76914b)
